Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hi. I'm not sure if you remember me, but it's Hiraga from the art club.[n]{f 1 5 0}You're not obligated to attend, obviously, but... {f 1 3 138} It would be really nice if you showed up.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be in the art room if you decide to stop by. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, are you gonna be at the club meeting? No pressure, of course, but if you're interested, I'd really like to paint together again. {f 1 3 137}[n]I'll have supplies ready for you if you come by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You keep showing up, so that must mean we're doing something right, huh? {f 1 3 137}[n]There should be a lot of members today, so it would be nice if you were there too. {f 1 3 136}[n]I'll wait for you at the club room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like you deserve an explanation.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll tell you all about it today, even if I have to do it in the middle of the club meeting. {f 1 3 136}[n]Hope to see you there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I must have made everyone worry when I left all of a sudden. {f 1 3 138}[n]Now that the dust has settled a little, I can focus on making art.[n]{f 1 5 0}You should come by. It would be nice to paint together. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I thought I had this all figured out... {f 1 3 138}[n]Do you worry about the future?[n]{f 1 5 0}Maybe I'm too in my head about this... Hopefully painting will ease the existential dread lol.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Still thinking about it... I've actually lost sleep over this. {f 1 3 138}[n]But I'm scheduled for cleaning duty today, so I'll be at the art club. {f 1 3 136}[n]Will I see you there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Please, if you can make it today, come to the art club. I really want to see you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Sorry. I don't mean to be selfish, it's just that I'd rather tell you in person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've asked everyone in the club to come today.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'd love it if you came too. Actually, I've decided that you have to. Doctor's orders. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hi! You coming to the art club today?[n]{f 1 5 0}Hope to see you there. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What better way to remedy that than a relaxing painting session?[n]{f 1 5 0}...[n]{f 1 5 0}Ok, sorry, I'll quit with the advertiser voice lol. Swing by if you'd like. {f 1 3 136}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've been trying out some new painting techniques lately. {f 1 3 137}[n]I'd be happy to teach you some of what I've learned.[n]{f 1 5 0}Of course, we can talk about things besides art, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}G'morning! {f 1 3 140}[n]Been feeling the burnout starting to creep up on me, so I'm gonna take some time for myself and go out.[n]{f 1 5 0}I know you're probably busy, but I'd love it if you joined me. Just let me know what you decide before this afternoon.[n]{f 1 5 0}Thanks! {f 1 3 140} {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry for reaching out on such short notice![n]{f 1 5 0}There's a movie out right now that's been getting some critical acclaim regarding its artistic direction. I'm sure it'd help with your charisma, too. {f 1 3 151}[n]I might've bought an extra ticket, and I was wondering if you'd like to come along. Let me know! {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}
